evals.name: colour-primitives-full
evals.prompt: Generate Storybook documentation for our colour primitives. The CSS file is at bs-storybook-docs-workspace/evals/files/tokens/colors.css. We use OKLCH with a 12-step ramp per palette. Include all palettes (neutral, brand, red, amber, green), step roles, and a dark theme comparison. Use the helpers from stories/helpers/.
evals.expected_output: A ColourPrimitives.docs.stories.tsx with swatch grids for each palette, step role annotations, and a theme comparison story
assertions: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Meta title starts with 'Foundations/'
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All 5 palettes have dedicated stories: neutral, brand, red, amber, green
Each palette story shows all 12 steps (50 through 1000)
Step role annotations present: background range (50-300), border range (400-600), solid range (700-800), text range (900-1000)
ThemeComparison story with data-theme light and dark wrappers
Uses Swatch component from stories/helpers/
Uses DocPage component from stories/helpers/
CSS custom property names match source file exactly (e.g. --colors-neutral-50)
No hardcoded hex colour values — uses var() references or OKLCH from source
Overview story showing all palettes at a glance

evals.name: spacing-scale-casual
evals.prompt: hey can you make storybook docs for our spacing and sizing tokens? the css is in bs-storybook-docs-workspace/evals/files/tokens/scale.css. should show the full scale visually with measured blocks, and group them by the gestalt tiers (tight/medium/loose). radii too please
evals.expected_output: A SpacingScale.docs.stories.tsx with visual rulers, tier groupings, and radii specimens
assertions: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Meta title starts with 'Foundations/'
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All spacing tokens present from --size-0 through --size-128
Gestalt tier grouping: tight (4-8), medium (12-20), loose (28-32+)
Both pixel and rem values shown for spacing tokens
Radii tokens documented: --radii-none through --radii-full
Uses DocPage and DemoBox from stories/helpers/
Visual rendering of scale (blocks/bars, not just a table)
Stroke weight tokens included (--stroke-weight-1 through 3)

evals.name: typography-minimal
evals.prompt: Document the typography tokens in Storybook. CSS: bs-storybook-docs-workspace/evals/files/tokens/typography.css
evals.expected_output: A TypographyScale.docs.stories.tsx with font size samples, weight scale, leading, and tracking
assertions: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Meta title starts with 'Foundations/'
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All font-size tokens present (--font-size-11 through --font-size-48)
Font weight scale shown (400, 500, 600, 700)
Leading scale documented (none through loose)
Tracking scale documented (tighter through wider)
Text samples rendered at actual token sizes (not just listed)
Uses DocPage from stories/helpers/
Font family tokens included (sans and mono)
